creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #1)

Hi Tobias,


USES=git is for the situation when the project isn't on github and is only available as a git repository.

For example:
* science/salome-configuration
* science/salome-kernel
* math/ttmath

The Salome project has a lot of modules that all should be ported as ports, and Salome is only distributed through a Git server: https://git.salome-platform.org/gitweb/
So there will be a lot more ports like this.


Yuri
